companies.title: MoMo
companies.overview: MoMo is Vietnam’s premier digital wallet and super-app, offering a comprehensive suite of services ranging from peer-to-peer transfers and bill payments to gaming and travel bookings.

companies.title: Easypaisa
companies.overview: Launched initially as a money transfer service, Easypaisa has evolved into Pakistan's top digital lifestyle app and branchless banking service.

companies.title: Papara
companies.overview: Papara is a Turkish financial technology company providing a borderless, fast, and free financial super-app and prepaid cards for the unbanked and digital natives.

companies.title: Afterpay
companies.overview: Afterpay is a leading BNPL platform that allows customers to pay for their purchases in four interest- free installments. It was acquired by Block (formerly Square) in 2022.

companies.title: KakaoPay
companies.overview: KakaoPay is the digital wallet and financial services arm of Kakao, fully integrated into South Korea's ubiquitous messaging app, KakaoTalk.

companies.title: Mercado Pago
companies.overview: Initially the payment solution for the Mercado Libre marketplace, it has grown into Latin America's largest fintech platform, offering wallets, credit, and merchant services.

companies.title: Chipper Cash
companies.overview: Chipper Cash offers free, cross-border mobile money transfers across several African countries, along with crypto trading and virtual cards.

companies.title: Paymob
companies.overview: Paymob is a leading omnichannel payment infrastructure enabler in the MENAP region, building APIs for online and offline payment acceptance.

companies.title: M-Pesa
companies.overview: M-Pesa is a pioneering mobile phone-based money transfer, financing, and microfinancing service that operates over standard SMS/USSD networks.

companies.title: UPI
companies.overview: UPI is an instant real-time payment system developed by the National Payments Corporation of India, facilitating inter-bank peer-to-peer and person-to-merchant transactions seamlessly.

companies.title: Paga
companies.overview: Paga is a Nigerian mobile payment company that allows users to transfer money electronically and make payments through their mobile devices or through a massive network of physical agents.

companies.title: Grab Financial
companies.overview: The financial arm of Southeast Asia's top super-app, offering GrabPay, insurance, lending, and wealth management services across multiple SEA countries.

companies.title: ADGM
companies.overview: ADGM is an international financial center and free zone in Abu Dhabi that operates with its own independent civil and commercial laws based on English common law.

companies.title: Revolut
companies.overview: Revolut is a global financial super-app that started by offering multi-currency cards with cheap exchange rates and has expanded into crypto, stock trading, and full banking services.

companies.title: Nubank
companies.overview: Nubank is one of the world's largest independent digital banking platforms, originally launching with a no-fee purple credit card controlled entirely via a mobile app.

companies.title: Klar
companies.overview: Klar is a Mexican financial technology company offering a 100% digital, transparent, and free alternative to traditional credit cards and debit accounts.
